case_title: MAZEN FAKHOURI VS. MAURIZIO IANTORNO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAKHOURI, MAZEN TRUSTEE OF THE MANHAI FAKHOURI REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IANTORNO, MAURIZIO DISTEFANO, SALVATORE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1361 CHURCH STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94114 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IANTORNO, MAURIZIO DISTEFANO, SALVATORE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) (NO COPY TO CONFORM)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAKHOURI, MAZEN TRUSTEE OF THE MANHAI FAKHOURI REVOCABLE TRUST SERVED AUG-29-2017, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT IANTORNO, MAURIZIO
